name: Namami
overview: This story revolves mainly around Janaki (mother), Bivan (Janaki's son) and Namami (the daughter-in-law/ Bivan's wife).  To a mother, her children are all the wealth in the world and happiness in life. She'd go to the end of the world, to protect her children. Sometimes, that love can be overbearing, or, in this case, can be over protective.
